scope: Parameter closure matrix for the two Tencent Video main interfaces, normalized from current canonical inventory and gap-priority artifacts.

status_legend.closed: 作用/取值/依赖/错误形态/环境范围/能力面都已被当前证据充分覆盖
status_legend.mostly_closed: 主行为已稳定，但仍有少量重复键或边缘分支待补
status_legend.partially_closed: 主作用与关键错误形态已知，但仍缺重要值域或环境结论
status_legend.branch_partially_closed: 主分支族已知，但正分支全集或能力差异仍未穷尽
status_legend.environment_open: 匿名环境下已知，但跨环境闭环未完成

wide punctuation-heavy value families still tend to raw-passthrough into the wrapper prefix, and the 2026-06-22 unmatched-delimiter follow-up further tightened the boundary: `[` and `[[` still raw-passthrough, while `[(`, `{(`, `/*(`, `a[(`, `)(`, `](`, and `}(` now join the current parse-breaking representative family alongside earlier `a(` / `((` / `})();` cases
wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback wrapper selection in the tested same-day anonymous branch (`cb1` rewrites the wrapper; `a(` still creates a parse-breaking shell)
real anonymous visitor-cookie replay confirms the same callback precedence and wrong-appkey error-shell behavior on both PC Web and Mobile H5 for the tested cases

unlocked_capabilities: custom JSONP callback wrapper
remaining_gaps: Aged-cookie/login-state replay is still open for callback precedence and error-shell behavior.

The parse-breaking family boundary is stronger after the 2026-06-22 unmatched-delimiter follow-up, but callback grammar closure is still open and remains lower priority than the environment gaps above.

top_remaining_closure_gaps.why_it_matters: Live anonymous visitor-cookie replay is now closed, so the highest-ROI remaining variable is whether older cookies or true login-state can still change the current parameter conclusions.

api1 missing_tid
api1 canonical_appid_missing_appkey
api2 baseline_xml_single
api2 otype_json_single
api2 all_invalid_jsonp_batch
api2 duplicate_and_empty_slots_json
api2 dup33_json

top_remaining_closure_gaps.why_it_matters: The broader sweep now confirms API2 positives on `535`, `540`, and `541` in XML/JSONP. The later 641-647 jump-scan still does not reveal a new positive cluster, the second plus third samples both show `642 -> -111013` as a local error-family island, the 2026-06-22 636-640 / 648-652 flanking follow-up goes back to ordinary `-111005` throughout XML/JSONP, and the 2026-06-22 522-525 cross-interface follow-up now confirms `525 -> -111013` as another stable forbidden-external island on API1 and API2. Sparse-cluster discovery therefore remains open as a hypothesis-quality question rather than an active positive lead.
suggested_cases: 522-525 cross-interface follow-up already completed: 522-524 ordinary `-111005`, 525 stable `-111013` on API1/API2
641-647 anonymous jump-scan already completed with no positive hits
636-640 and 648-652 flanking follow-up already completed with no positive or `-111013` expansion
if future scans revisit this band, treat `642` as a local error-family follow-up rather than a positive-cluster lead
next only expand when a new sparse-cluster hypothesis appears outside the tested 420-445 / 530-550 / 641-647 / 636-640,648-652 bands

top_remaining_closure_gaps.why_it_matters: API1 still has only one true positive (`431`) and one separate success-shell-without-sample branch (`537`). The newly added 418-421 and 526-536 probes tightened local error-family boundaries, the anonymous 641-647 jump-scan also came back fully negative, the 2026-06-22 636-640 / 648-652 flanking follow-up likewise returned ordinary `-111005` throughout, and the 2026-06-22 522-525 follow-up now shows API1 `525 -> -111013` with 522-524 staying ordinary `-111005`. Wider discovery outside the tested bands is still not mathematically closed, but the current lower-edge and 642-area negative boundaries are tighter.
suggested_cases: focused 428-434 and 533-540 sweep already completed
522-525 follow-up already completed: API1 525 is a stable local `-111013` boundary artifact, not a positive lead
anonymous 641-647 jump-scan already completed with no new branch
636-640 and 648-652 flanking follow-up already completed with no new branch
only expand further if another branch family appears outside the current high-signal bands

top_remaining_closure_gaps.why_it_matters: The new API1 boundary slice shows `534 -> 535 -> 536` as `-111013 -> 10010048 -> -111005`, and that same pattern now repeats on the second canonical CID. The follow-up value is no longer re-confirmation, but deciding whether this local island changes how we prioritize future API1 discovery.
suggested_cases: second-CID retest already completed with the same 534 -> 535 -> 536 pattern
treat API1 tid=535 as a stable local error-family boundary artifact, not a positive branch

top_remaining_closure_gaps.why_it_matters: The anonymous canonical branch and the later real anonymous visitor-cookie replay now both stay unchanged for `token/sign/sig/appver/access_token/authkey/openid`, so the remaining value is specifically whether those keys only matter under aged-cookie or real login-state replay.
suggested_cases: api2 XML + token=1 under aged-cookie jar
api2 XML + sign=1 under aged-cookie jar
api2 XML + appver=1.0.0 under login-state jar
api2 XML + openid=1 under login-state jar

top_remaining_closure_gaps.why_it_matters: Current anonymous canonical evidence plus real anonymous visitor-cookie replay say `union_platform` shows no visible split, but aged-cookie or login-gated branches could still consume it differently.

api2 JSONP baseline with login-state jar

top_remaining_closure_gaps.why_it_matters: The practical callback value-space now covers empty fallback, many raw-passthrough forms including slash/backslash/comment-like roots, plus a narrower pathological tail where closer-heavy punctuation still tends to raw-passthrough and `})();` joins the known parse-breaking family. The remaining uncertainty is now narrow and no longer blocks the main capability closure path.
suggested_cases: 2026-06-21 pathological tail follow-up already added `]/{/}/a]/a}/a))/a}})/a&b/a#b/a%20b/a>/a=` and `})();`
if callback probing continues, prioritize genuinely new unmatched-delimiter families rather than more closer-heavy raw-passthrough variants
only revisit environment behavior for callback after aged-cookie/login-state replay inputs exist
